scripts.db:count: node -e "import('child_process').then(({execSync})=>{const cmd=\"npx wrangler d1 execute archi_law_db --remote --command=\\\"SELECT 'law' t, COUNT(*) c FROM law UNION ALL SELECT 'law_version', COUNT(*) FROM law_version UNION ALL SELECT 'law_article', COUNT(*) FROM law_article;\\\"\"; execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit'});})"
scripts.db:latest: node -e "import('child_process').then(({execSync})=>{const k=process.env.LAW_KEY||'001823'; const cmd=\"npx wrangler d1 execute archi_law_db --remote --command=\\\"SELECT mst, 시행일, 공포일 FROM law_version WHERE law_key='\\\"+k+\"' ORDER BY 시행일 DESC LIMIT 1;\\\"\"; execSync(cmd,{stdio:'inherit'});})"
